channel.title: MexIHC 2026 - News (EN)
channel.description: Official RSS feed for MexIHC 2026 news and updates in English.

item.title: Call for Graduate Colloquium is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: Check the MexIHC 2026 Graduate Colloquium call. The submission deadline is August 9, 2026.

item.title: Call for Papers deadline extended for MexIHC 2026
item.description: The paper submission deadline was extended from June 1, 2026 to June 15, 2026.

item.title: Workshop deadline extended for MexIHC 2026
item.description: The workshop proposal deadline was extended from May 25, 2026 to June 8, 2026. The acceptance notification moved from May 29, 2026 to June 12, 2026.

item.title: Student Design Competition is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: Check the 2026 Student Design Competition call and submit your proposal before August 16, 2026.

item.title: Call for Tutorials is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: The organizing committee invites the submission of tutorial proposals on topics related to HCI.

item.title: Call for Workshops is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: Check the MexIHC 2026 Call for Workshops and submit your proposal before June 8, 2026.

item.title: Call for Papers is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: Check submission guidelines, topics, and important dates for the Call for Papers. The submission deadline is June 15, 2026.

item.title: MexIHC 2026 conference dates announced
item.description: MexIHC 2026 will take place October 27-30, 2026 in Ensenada, Baja California.
